content.en:
"Boom !!!"

The ancestor of the Tianrui Domain slashed towards the human realm with a sword.

With the strength of his top domain ancestor, he should be able to easily slash the human realm with a single sword.

However, just when the sword of the Tianrui Domain Ancestor was about to slash into the human realm, once the figure appeared, it stopped the sword of the Tianrui Domain Ancestor.

"Eternal Imperishable Holy Sacrament, open!"

"Holy Technique: Holy Armor, Open!"

"The power of the Extreme Dao, open!"

Ye Tian didn't dare to underestimate a top domain ancestor, no matter how weak the Tianrui domain ancestor was, it was equivalent to a saint-endowed person of the One Realm, and it was even stronger.

Because the Triple Overlimit Level Saint Endowment can't always burst out of combat power, the Holy Skill consumes too much energy, and the cultivation of the One Realm is still too low, and there is no way to fight for a long time, so you have to fight quickly.

The weaker Top Domain Ancestor is no match for the Perfectionist of the One Realm, and will be killed quickly.

But once you can't kill it, then the one who will eventually lose is the Holy Endower.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not underestimate the Tianrui Domain Ancestor, even if the Tianrui Domain Ancestor was not a very powerful top Domain Ancestor, he could not be underestimated.

If he didn't use the Holy Technique and the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, Ye Tian really couldn't defeat the Tianrui Domain Ancestor.

Moreover, not all realms' top domain ancestors were weak.

Some domain ancestors are very able to hide, maybe they have obtained some inheritance in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and they have become holy bodies, plus the domain art is perfect, and their combat effectiveness is also exaggerated, far surpassing the ordinary triple overlimiters.

Encountering such a top-notch domain ancestor, even if Ye Tian went all out now, he would definitely not be able to defeat him, unless he used the Forbidden Yuan Blade.

Rumble!!!!

The sword of the Tianrui Domain Ancestor was blocked by Ye Tian and did not cause any damage to Ye Tian.

This was just a casual sword, so Ye Tian had no way to judge the true strength of the Tianrui Domain Ancestor.

However, he estimated that the strength of the Tianrui Domain Ancestor should not be strong.

"Tianrui Domain Ancestor, you dare to attack the human world?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"You are the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, you are indeed very demonic, with the cultivation of the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, you can block my sword, but you don't dare to kill the Tianyin Domain Ancestor. Today, you will die!" said the Tianrui Domain Ancestor's killing intent.

Maybe before, if his killing intent towards Ye Tian was only 80 points, then now it is 100 points!

The two sides have already formed a mortal enemy, Ye Tian has just returned to the same realm, and he can actually block his move, which is too rebellious, it simply breaks his cognition.

If he waited for Ye Tian to break through to become a domain ancestor, wouldn't he be dead?

Therefore, he must kill Ye Tian today.

"Besiege him!"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor ordered.

This time, he brought more than thirty domain ancestors, including six elite domain ancestors.

He didn't bring anyone else here because he had to hurry, and there was a certain danger in crossing the dark forbidden realm this time, once he brought the people of the entire sect, in case of heavy losses, he would also feel distressed.

Besides, if he snatched that mysterious treasure, broke through to the Supreme Domain Ancestor level, and then went back to bring all the people from the sect over, it would not be too late.

Bang!!!!

More than thirty domain ancestors shot out in unison, and Haohai Wei could seem to wipe Ye Tianlian and the human world together.

"Five Elements Ban!"

Ye Tian used this holy technique and instantly blocked this area.

Thundered!!!

The blow of many domain ancestors bombarded the Five Elements Ban, but it did not completely break the Five Elements Ban.

"Do you have such strength?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Immediately, he performed another holy skill - streamer!

Swish!

Ye Tian's speed reached an incredible level, and an ordinary domain ancestor didn't react, and was directly killed by Ye Tian with one blow.

Puff puff!!!

A Famous Domain Ancestor died in Ye Tian's hands, and he couldn't stop the second move at all.

Ye Tian's speed was so fast that even the Tianrui Domain Ancestor couldn't react, let alone the other Domain Ancestors?

The speed of the ordinary domain ancestor facing Ye Tian was like a wooden man, and he was afraid that he would not notice it when he died.

The difference in strength is too big!

"How can it be so fast?"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor was dumbfounded.

What kind of speed is this, it is much, much faster than him.

This is not normal!

Ye Tiancai has completed his cultivation in the One Realm, even if he cultivates a domain technique to the extreme level, the speed cannot be too fast!

Coupled with the Holy Body Consummation, Secret Treasure and other things, all the means to increase the speed of the Domain, but there is still no way to be so fast as the speed of his top domain ancestor, right?

He didn't know the Holy Technique, otherwise it would be strange.

In short, his vision was too low, and he didn't understand Ye Tian's rebellion at all.

Soon, all the ordinary domain ancestors died, and only the Tianrui domain ancestors and the six elite domain ancestors remained.

The Tianrui Domain Ancestor couldn't beat Ye Tian at all, and any domain technique that limited speed could hardly affect Ye Tian.

Because of the Holy Technique Streamer that Ye Tian cast, the power of the Holy Technique could almost ignore the domain techniques that generally limited speed.

Abrupt.

A golden thread instantly slashed across the body of an elite domain ancestor.

In an instant, that Elite Domain Ancestor was cut in two, and his body shattered little by little.

Elite Domain Ancestor, Fallen.

"Gather together, don't be killed alone!"

The ancestral voice of the Tianrui Domain said.

The remaining five Elite Domain Ancestors were gathered, and four of them all cast defensive domain techniques and stacked them.

Then under the leadership of Tianrui Domain Ancestor - retreat!

That's right, the ancestor of the Tianrui Domain was instigated and didn't dare to fight anymore.

Otherwise, not only will the remaining Elite Domain Ancestor die, but he may also die.

"I was too impulsive, I thought that the people in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm deliberately boasted about the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, but I didn't expect him to be even more terrifying than the legend!"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor regretted it.

Abrupt.

Another golden thread slashed.

The four Elite Domain Ancestors teamed up to stack defensive domain techniques to try to block the blow, but no matter how powerful the Elite Domain Ancestor was, it was not as good as a top domain ancestor.

Ye Tian's blow could kill the top domain ancestors, naturally it was not comparable to these five elite domain ancestors.

They gathered together, and it was a hurry to find death!!

Puff puff puff!!!

The stacked shields of the four defensive domain techniques were instantly broken, and then the five elite domain ancestors were cut off in two by the Golden Silk Sacred Technique with one blow, and then shattered and died.

Kill five Elite Domain Ancestors in one blow.

At this time, only the Tianrui Domain Ancestor was left.

He wanted to escape, but the surroundings were blocked by Ye Tian's Five Elements, and he had no way to break the blockade and leave.

"You're going to die under my strongest holy skill!"

Ye Tian used his spatial holy technique - Void Slash!

I saw Ye Tian swipe casually, and a holy technique similar to a space blade slashed away, and it was slashed away in an instant.

And the Tianrui Domain Ancestor urged his defensive domain weapon with all his might, and held a sword of a high-grade domain weapon, and performed a great sword domain technique, colliding with Ye Tian's void slash.

Click!!!

The sword of the superior domain weapon was cut off by the void slash, and the defensive domain weapon on the body was also cut off.

Moreover, the body of the Tianrui Domain Ancestor was also cut off, and the vitality passed quickly, and the physical body could not stop disintegrating.

"What kind of means is this?"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor muttered.

"This is a holy skill, a holy skill above the domain technique!"

Ye Tian explained.

"I see!"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor smiled bitterly, his consciousness collapsed, and he completely fell and died.
